protocol.name: lvr_private_handle

protocol.description:
This protocol allows a compositor to associate a Wayland client with external IPC mechanisms, such as D-Bus.
Immediately after a client binds to the lvr_private_handle_manager global, the compositor sends the client a compositor-generated, opaque identifier exactly once. The identifier is a string of up to 64 characters and consists only of alphanumeric characters and underscores. It is generated with sufficient randomness to prevent other clients from guessing it.
The client may use this handle to identify itself to external IPC mechanisms through means not defined by this protocol.

interface.name: lvr_private_handle_manager
interface.description: This interface allows a compositor to announce support for private handles.

description.summary: destroy the private handle manager object
